title: Bubblebun the Marshmallow Creature
bio: Bubblebun is a marshmallow creature who floats through sketchbooks looking for compliments.

steps.title: Squish the shape
steps.instruction: Draw a rounded marshmallow blob with a slightly flat bottom.
steps.hint: Avoid perfect symmetry; cute creatures wobble.

steps.title: Add the face
steps.instruction: Add two glossy eyes and a little smile.
steps.hint: Place the eyes slightly lower than center.

steps.title: Add cheek magic
steps.instruction: Draw round cheeks and tiny curved arms.
steps.hint: Cheeks can overlap the face area a little.

steps.title: Add bubbles
steps.instruction: Place small floating bubbles around the character.
steps.hint: Use odd numbers of bubbles for a natural look.

steps.title: Clean lines & color
steps.instruction: Ink the blob, fill it, and add soft shaded edges.
